description_long: This helmet features a robust, dark metallic shell with a pronounced central ridge running from front to back, giving it a formidable and protective appearance. The front is equipped with a T-shaped visor opening, providing visibility while shielding the face. On each side, large, curved ram-like horns extend outward and then curl forward, attached securely to the helmet's sides. The horns are textured and brown, contrasting with the smooth, matte black finish of the main helmet body. The rear of the helmet is solid and rounded, offering full cranial coverage. There are no visible logos, graphics, or ventilation openings, and the interior is likely hollow to accommodate a human head.
description: A dark, horned helmet with a T-shaped visor and large, curled brown horns on each side, featuring a matte black finish and full head coverage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the T-shaped visor opening and both large, forward-curving horns.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the helmet and the full curvature of the left horn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, rounded back of the helmet and the symmetrical attachment of both horns.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the right horn's curve and the helmet's side profile.
